rules: DO NOT use Inter or generic Sans for headings.
Headings (Size > 32px) MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Never center align by default; rely on strict left alignment for data and tables.
No generic full-screen gradients. Apply the blue/purple gradient strategically (e.g., active buttons, 'Tracing Beam' borders, or subtle glows).
Never use pure #000000. Always tint neutral greys (e.g., Zinc scale).
Hover states MUST explicitly set text color and have higher contrast than default states.

layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.spacing: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6) to prevent text collision with borders.
layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, dark surface, high-contrast active links with an indigo left-border accent.
layout.topbar: Sticky header utilizing 'Crystal Glassmorphism': backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/60 border-b border-white/10.

components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border, no heavy shadow. Use 'The Grid Borders' look for dense data.
components.buttons: Primary buttons use the blue/purple gradient with hover:brightness-110. Secondary buttons are transparent with a 1px border.
components.ai_advisor_panel: Must stand out. Use 'The Tracing Beam' effect or a subtle background image with heavy overlay (bg-black/80) to feel 'smart' and distinct from standard data cards.
components.charts: Recharts. Remove default cartesian grids. Use area charts with blue/purple gradient fills fading to transparent at the bottom.
components.tables: Dense. Use Shadcn Table. No row background unless hovered (hover:bg-zinc-800/50).
components.general: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts. Use Shadcn for interactive logic (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Select) but customize heavily to match the dark theme.

rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Setup Tailwind config to use these fonts and add the custom colors (obsidian/zinc tones, indigo/purple).
Build the Sidebar and Top Navbar layout first.
Implement the Dashboard view with KPI cards using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4.
Integrate Recharts for Sales and Customer Analytics. Style them minimally without heavy grid lines.

Create the AI Decision Advisor panel as a distinct section. Use the abstract background image (ai_advisor_bg) heavily darkened with a glassmorphism overlay, and the requested blue/purple gradient accent on its borders or title.
For the Geo Analytics map, use react-simple-maps or a similar library to render a dark-themed world map with scatter points indicating customer density.
Ensure all CRUD operations (Sales, Customer) utilize Shadcn Dialog/Table components and are wired to the backend API.
Ensure hover states have higher contrast and interactive elements are obvious.
Include data-testid attributes for robust automated testing.
